llm.summary: The task is complete in substance. The repository has Prisma/SQLite endpoint persistence, migrations, deterministic db preparation, idempotent protected seed defaults, generated schema documentation, and unit coverage proving repeatable db:prepare behavior. The provided mandatory gate results all passed, and the implementation stays within the endpoint persistence scope mapped to endpoint-tool-management.md.
satisfied_exit_criteria: npm run db:prepare is wired to create data/, apply Prisma migrations, generate Prisma Client, and run seed defaults against SQLite.
Seed preparation is idempotent via upserts and the unit test runs db:prepare twice against an isolated SQLite database while asserting singular endpoint, parameter, and response-case rows.

The Prisma schema represents endpoint names, title/description, enabled state, immutable IDs, delete code, default response JSON, basic failure config, ordered parameters, response cases, timestamps, and case-level delay/error fields.
docs/generated/db-schema.md matches the implemented Endpoint, EndpointParam, ResponseCase persistence shape and seed assumptions.
Required checks are reported passing: npm run db:prepare, npm run test:unit, and npm run verify.

summary: The task is complete in substance. The repository has Prisma/SQLite endpoint persistence, migrations, deterministic db preparation, idempotent protected seed defaults, generated schema documentation, and unit coverage proving repeatable db:prepare behavior. The provided mandatory gate results all passed, and the implementation stays within the endpoint persistence scope mapped to endpoint-tool-management.md.
